race.comment: MOUSSAKA (5) made a mess of his rivals on debut at Balaklava last time when sent out fav. Is open to further improvement fourth-up and is expected to relish the rise in trip. Holder sticking is another bonus. Can make it two on the bounce. VALUED (7) backs up quickly after chasing the progressive Orlova into second on Saturday. Easier this time, though he's likely to drift right back from the wide alley. If the tempo is genuine he can reel them in late. SWAN DANCE (14) is yet to strike through but is knocking on the door and this looks a nice race for her. Drawn sticky but with even luck she should be making her presence felt. MASTER OF CEREMONY (4) has been knocking on the door for a while and doesn't have to improve much to break a long run of outs. Not dismissing.
